name: Batter-Fried Dandelion
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick the dandelions as close to the head as possible (the stems are very bitter). Rinse well and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Beat the egg, milk, flour, salt, and pepper in a small bowl until smooth.
3. Dip each flower into the batter.
4. Heat oil for frying to 350°F - 375°F (hot but not smoking).
5. Deep-fry the dandelion flowers in the hot oil until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with salt before serving.
